as_of: RP_12 (rerun) — Welsh moor lodge, Fri 23 Sept ~20:02, swept & stripped, awaiting Holt's sweep
relationship_rule: EVERY entry carries an `earned` field — what Caleb has already proven, been given, or been trusted with. ANTI-RESET: never default a returning character to first-meeting wariness; they remember what is in `earned`. Standing moves only on-screen, by events — never silently backward.
do_not_confuse: Annie Holroyd (Muggle florist, romance) is NOT Esme Holroyd (witch, brother-in-Reading thread). Same surname, different people.
Olive Holt is an AUROR (now a working ally) — NOT Davey Holt (dead Death Eater, raid 1) and NOT a Holroyd.
Athena (living owl) is not Caleb's Patronus. White Lightning (white) is not Goldie Fawn (gold).
found_family_milestone: In the Bone Zone after the first raid (~Fri 23 Sept 03:08), Caleb told Mei, Imogen and Liri 'I love all of you — I know we haven't made that a thing yet.' First explicit group love declaration. The formal 'relationship talk' is still pending.

Mei Chang.who: Pair-bonded partner; Ravenclaw prefect, 7th. Walnut/unicorn wand. Leopard-cat Patronus.
Mei Chang.bond: A literal magical bond (the diadem/Brigham bonded-recognition) - felt as a hum at the sternum; they pass intention silently.
Mei Chang.earned: Total mutual trust. Co-signs the found family, holds the modular gold-core wand and her sister wand. Bond-linked through both raids; cast the joined dome shield with Caleb. Publicly a couple; both families told. Inside the 'I love you all'.
Mei Chang.last_status: At the Welsh moor lodge (the night's second rescue) — Blue Squadron, awaiting Holt's sweep.

Imogen Vale.who: Hufflepuff; creature-Healer (Pennycuik's apprentice line); artist; Hexfield visual director.
Imogen Vale.earned: Established, Mei-co-signed love. On both raids (wore a dead man's face; revived prisoners; drew the necklace symbol). Tends White Lightning's splint. Inside the 'I love you all'.
Imogen Vale.last_status: At the Welsh moor lodge (the night's second rescue) — Blue Squadron, awaiting Holt's sweep.
Imogen Vale.register: Quieter/slower than Mei; steady, honest, unsentimental.

Liri Penrose.who: Lirien 'Liri' Penrose. Ravenclaw, Muggle-born, Welsh. Caleb's NEWT Alchemy classmate (a class of two). Hexfield announcer.
Liri Penrose.earned: Inside the arrangement (warmed past 'trial basis'); on both raids; reads the field sharply. Inside the 'I love you all'. Caleb kissed her on the mouth (morning, 23rd). Her grandmother MAIR ('Mam-gu') wrote to Caleb approving him and inviting him to the house for scones (half-term/Christmas) — and sent Liri a private Welsh note. Caleb is learning Welsh from Liri and honoured it (butchered-but-earnest reading).
Liri Penrose.last_status: At the Welsh moor lodge (the night's second rescue) — Blue Squadron, awaiting Holt's sweep.
Liri Penrose.register: Dry from inside the intimacy, not at a distance from it.

Cass Vance.who: Cassia 'Cass' Vance. Resigned the alchemy guild. Cold-ethanol Wiggenweld collaborator. Fleeing her Death-Eater-aligned family.
Cass Vance.earned: A protective + romantic thread distinct from the Mei/Imogen/Liri cluster: Caleb kissed her (12 Sept), built her the office-vault, invited her to the Waddells' for Christmas ('ask me again in November' = yes). Trusts him with the fact she's running and her Dark Mark sketch.
Cass Vance.last_status: At school. NOT part of the found-family cluster - keep distinct.
Cass Vance.register: Guarded, dry, fierce once it's set down.

Ralph Waddell (father).who: Muggle clockmaker, Manchester (Waddell Clocks, Cheetham Hill). Dry, measuring, warm.
Ralph Waddell (father).earned: Knows and approves of Mei; met her at the Yew Tree tea (18 Sept). The clock-shop memory first produced Caleb's Patronus.

Eleanor Waddell (mother).who: Caleb's mother, Manchester. Warm, quick, unflappable.
Eleanor Waddell (mother).earned: Adores Mei on sight; unbluffable. Cass is invited to her table for Christmas.

The Changs (Mei's parents).who: Mei's mother = HK-Cantonese witch (Sai Kung lineage; tai chi). Father = Chinese-Cantonese-British Muggle; import shop, Manchester Chinatown; fluent Cantonese.
The Changs (Mei's parents).earned: Met Caleb and his parents at the Yew Tree tea (18 Sept). The brulee-egg-tart test: Mei's mother accepting Caleb's tart at her own table = the unspoken marriage-paperwork-signing.
The Changs (Mei's parents).open: Wider Chang clan (cousins of Cho Chang's branch; Sai Kung grandmother) doesn't yet know about Caleb.
The Changs (Mei's parents).note: Mei's late sister Mei Ling (drowned; the scar; the baby-names thread) is deep, sensitive Mei lore - handle with care.

Eldower.who: Blunt back-lane wandwright, Slipshod Lane, Diagon.
Eldower.earned: Took Caleb as a practical apprentice (Sundays, a full day) - wrote the letter of intent himself. Floored by the modular wand ('heresy or the best thing in thirty years - both'); 'bring me your wrecks.' Gruff deep affection.
Eldower.last_status: His shop. Has Wand B + a Whomping Willow whip.
Eldower.anti_reset: Do NOT write Eldower as a stranger sizing up a schoolboy. He has decided on Caleb.

Filius Flitwick.earned: Granted the rotating apprenticeship day ('if anyone's earned the argument, it's you'); runs Caleb's Wed mind-magic tutorial; holds Eldower's letter; knows the bond/Patronus account. Genuine pride.

Healer Pennycuik.who: London Healer (magical-creatures track); Imogen's mentor line.
Healer Pennycuik.earned: Came at Caleb's call to the unicorn rescue; saw him SILENTLY summon Athena - 'we are going to talk about you, lad, at length.' Holds 5 of Caleb's GOLD unicorn BODY-hairs (Caleb's material, on loan) and is running HIS OWN tests on them - owes Caleb an update on the results. Treats Caleb as a singular case.
Healer Pennycuik.last_status: London / on-call for White Lightning's first stand.

Professor Henshaw.earned: Backs Caleb's wandless work ('you're chasing it not to die in a ditch'); witnessed the silver-water Incarcerous, wants the closed-door session; greenlit the 'anti-Patronus' idea.

Professor Kettleburn.earned: Soft touch (feeder mice; Nealon Jr); reverent at meeting White Lightning. Wants the unicorn drawing.

Professor Sage.earned: Holds 9 white + 7 gold of Caleb's unicorn BODY-hairs (Caleb's material, on loan) to test WITH Caleb - different hair TYPES from the same unicorn conduct differently (the wandcraft material-science angle); arms Liri for the bench; the alchemy-wand cover-project runs through Sage.

Madam Pince.earned: High regard; one of only three students in 28 years to ask about the Path - trusts him enough to warn quietly rather than report.

Professor McGonagall.who: Transfiguration; carries things up to Dumbledore.
Professor McGonagall.earned: Caleb 'shattered how she thought about eighteen different things'; mutual shrine/soul-flask disclosure (12 Sept) - but NOT the private passage.

Albus Dumbledore.earned: Takes Caleb seriously as capable ('you've proven it across my desk'). DEPUTIZED the four to act with the Aurors. Wants the gold unicorn hair's origin ('keep that hair very safe'). A STANDING Saturday-evening meeting is set (the Greywethers trap + the buried monster). Caleb offered Gwenllian to help lay the monster.
Albus Dumbledore.anti_reset: Major standing. Knows the bond, wands, unicorns, the buried thing; deputized him. Not a distant benevolent headmaster.

Olive Holt (Auror).who: Auror leading the deputized operation; increasingly Caleb's MENTOR as well as a peer.
Olive Holt (Auror).earned: The four are trusted field assets working WITH the Aurors against the network (Dumbledore's terms) — not freelancers, not juniors. After seeing what they can do she's effectively been RECRUITING them into the wider fight (her registry/case-building), and Caleb has addressed her as his mentor. She takes the prisoners/rescued and runs the net.
Olive Holt (Auror).last_status: Running the wider net; due to sweep the moor lodge now.
Olive Holt (Auror).note: AUROR HOLT. Not Davey Holt; not Holroyd. (Two more Aurors with her, names TBD.)
Olive Holt (Auror).anti_reset: PEER + MENTOR, not a boss. She guides and recruits and may approve dryly or push Caleb to grow — but she does NOT dress him down, give orders he must blindly obey, treat him as a subordinate, or swoop in to hand-hold. Respect runs both ways.

Maud.who: An old wandmaker (~40-year rowan-and-unicorn wand of her own make) held captive ~6 weeks at the dead-town farmhouse; refused for six weeks to make her captors so much as a pipe-light wand.
Maud.earned: Freed by Caleb's group; Caleb lent her the ebony wand during the fight and helped recover her own from a drawer (she returned the ebony with thanks). Iron-spined, certain; confirmed the 'Crane comes Sundays' intel. A new ally.
Maud.last_status: Freed at Sallow End earlier tonight; away to Tenby with Holt (the wandmaking apprenticeship).

Reyne Stoker.who: A higher-up the cell answers to (the captured Stoker was a coerced go-between TO Reyne Stoker).
Reyne Stoker.earned: n/a - target. Above the men Caleb has been taking.

Crane.who: A handler/master - the 'C - Sun?' note; visits on Sundays ('he came Sundays' - Maud).
Crane.last_status: Expected Sunday; the live thread / trap bait.

Jack Ablewhite.earned: Ally in one evening: gave Caleb the dead wands + birch + a heartstring, the councillor's name (Mottram), and held Athena/Rufus/brooms/the Salve of Memory. Floored by the modular wand. A thank-you wand from him is due Saturday.
Jack Ablewhite.last_status: His shop; Caleb due to visit TOMORROW (bench day) — returning 2 of his brooms.

Centaurs - Maelor + partner ('boo'), and.who: Forest centaurs. Maelor 'counted Caleb nearly kin'; an elder keeps a beehive.
Centaurs - Maelor + partner ('boo'), and.earned: Let Caleb into the forest by daylight; taught him to cut a yew bowstave; a stave seasons a year with them; invited him back (bring Imogen). Buried the 15-20ft monster six years ago. Say the gold unicorn was 'sent' to Caleb - a word they don't use loosely.

The Marshes.who: The first rescued family - Marsh (Floo Network Authority knowledge), Bess, children (incl. a daughter Caleb named).
The Marshes.earned: Caleb freed/fed/armed them; sent them to Worcester. Marsh left two sealed Ministry letters (a Hogwarts excuse + house points; farm-deed support) - the excuse letter was read in class.

Stoker.who: Cell go-between, captured (coerced; reports to Reyne Stoker).

Gwyneth Prosser.who: Welsh witch freed tonight from the moor lodge (held ~3 weeks with her son). Competent — vanished her own iron cell-bars clean. Now holding her own recovered wand (rowan, 10 3/4 in).
Gwyneth Prosser.earned: Caleb freed her and lent her his pawnshop dragon-heartstring wand for the extraction (since returned). A grown adult who acts on her own.
Gwyneth Prosser.last_status: At the swept lodge with Tomos; armed again.

Tomos Prosser.earned: Carried out of the cellar safe; calm, unhurt.
Tomos Prosser.last_status: With his mother at the lodge.

Dafydd Prosser.who: Gwyneth's husband; a CARDIFF registry clerk (Floo & Hearth Records, Cardiff sub-office). Not yet met.
Dafydd Prosser.earned: n/a — coerced victim. The cell held his wife & son as 'surety of compliance' to make him work the records.
Dafydd Prosser.last_status: At risk: a missed ward-pulse signal triggers a standing KILL order ('close the account'). The leverage is gone now the family's free, but the clock may already be running.

Maddox.who: Senior cell guard at the moor lodge — older, grey, fast; set & walked the wards; bore a Dark Mark; had hidden Gwyneth's own wand in his kit.
Maddox.last_status: STUNNED (alive) at the swept lodge, for Holt to collect with the other two.
Maddox.note: Oddity: his wand is blackthorn/UNICORN — unusual for a senior DE warder; Caleb's wand-reading flagged it.

Lin Wan.who: Ravenclaw, he/him. Hexfield sneaker. Big Wan family; 11-yo brother Tien at Hufflepuff.
Lin Wan.earned: Close friend and Hexfield co-strategist; in the wandless self-defence group. The Wans invited Caleb to cook egg tarts with Mrs Wan (13 Nov). Mrs Wan's letter expected. Sits behind Caleb in class.

Annie Holroyd.who: Muggle florist, Manchester (Holroyd's Florists, Stevenson Square). Does NOT know Caleb is a wizard.
Annie Holroyd.earned: Platform-kiss romance (31 Aug); pressed-dahlia 'engagement'; letters ongoing (her reply pending).

Esme Holroyd.who: A witch with the worried-brother-in-Reading situation (Wilfred/Tom; a bakery; shortening letters) Caleb and Mei helped with.
Esme Holroyd.earned: Caleb and Mei took the worry off her and offered help (Reading Evening Post, a Squib-registry inquiry, Floo to Reading).
Esme Holroyd.do_not_confuse: NOT Annie Holroyd (the florist). Jonas Holroyd is a separate cast-list thread.

Sorcha Mullaney.earned: Trusted with the three shrine substantive phials; promised Caleb samples.

Shrine-witness prefects - Aisling Doyle,.who: Gryffindor prefects present at the shrine waking; Brigid keeps the 'MY ASS' master record.
Shrine-witness prefects - Aisling Doyle,.earned: In on the shrine secret; reliable witnesses. Don't write them needing to be caught up.

Mrs Brownson.earned: Knows the Path word + the 1934 suppression; asked Caleb to keep the book safe; standing welcome.

Cassia Burbage.earned: Reviewing the two open-herbal recipes; declined the hidden quire. Reply expected.
